Head_Voice,Eighty_Percent_Feeling,Why_Do_Best,Avoidance_Duration,Asking_Help_Feeling,Primary_Cause
"You're already behind, so why even try to catch up?","Like I'm a fake who finally got stuck.","I need to get a high grade to feel like I’m not failing at life.","3 weeks","Embarrassed that I’ve let the work pile up this high.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelm"
"This has to be the best thing anyone has ever read.","I feel a sense of dread, like I'm leaving a mistake behind.","I can't stand the idea of being 'average'.","1 month","Anxious. I don't want them to see my messy first drafts.","Perfectionism"
"If I ask for an extension, they'll think I'm lazy.","Guilty. My parents expect nothing less than the best.","I don't want to lose the respect of my department.","12 days","Terrified of being judged as 'that' student who can't cope.","Validation/External Pressure"
"Everything is too loud and too much. I can't think.","Relieved to just have it out of my sight.","I'm just trying to keep my head above water.","2 months","Too tired to even formulate a coherent question.","Burnout"
"You don't belong here, everyone else finds this easy.","It proves I'm not as smart as my admissions essay said.","I'm trying to prove to myself that I'm not a mistake.","5 days","Insecure. I feel like I'll sound stupid the moment I speak.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I'll start as soon as I finish cleaning the whole house.","Horrible. I’d rather pull an all-nighter than submit 'okay' work.","Because my identity is 'the smart one'.","1 week","Obsessive. I only want help if they can make it perfect.","Perfectionism"
"I've read the instructions five times and still don't get it.","Like a failure because I can't follow simple directions.","I want to do well, but the path is invisible.","2 weeks","Stupid for needing the basics explained again.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelm"
"My scholarship depends on this grade. Don't mess up.","Panicked. One B- could ruin my entire future.","I am terrified of losing my funding or my status.","3 weeks","Desperate but scared of appearing incompetent to the dean.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I just want to close my eyes and make it all go away.","Numb. The grade doesn't feel real anymore.","I'm only doing this because I have to, not because I want to.","5 weeks","Defeated. I don't have the breath to ask for help.","Burnout"
"You're just a good guesser, you don't actually know this.","Like the mask is slipping and people will see the real me.","I want to feel like I actually earned my spot here.","6 days","Like a fraud. I'm afraid they'll see I'm struggling.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"One typo means the whole thing is trash.","I feel itchy and anxious, like I'm submitting something broken.","I have to be perfect to feel safe.","10 days","Resistant. I don't trust anyone else's standards.","Perfectionism"
"I have the ideas, but I can't get them onto the paper.","Frustrated. It’s like my brain and hands aren't connected.","I want to show what I know, but I'm stuck in the mud.","2 weeks","Annoying. I feel like a burden for needing extra guidance.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelm"
"What if the professor uses my work as a 'bad' example?","Sick. I can't handle the thought of being the worst in class.","I want to be the student everyone admires.","9 days","Small. I hate feeling like I'm being scrutinized.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I'm so far gone I don't even care if I fail.","Apathetic. It's just another deadline I missed.","I'm just trying to get through the day without crying.","3 months","Exhausted. The effort of asking is more than the effort of failing.","Burnout"
"Everyone else is already done, what's wrong with me?","Like I'm slower than everyone else and always will be.","I want to keep up, but I feel like I'm running in place.","4 days","Ashamed. I don't want them to see how far behind I am.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"It’s not good enough yet. I need more time to polish.","I feel like a quitter for not giving it 100%.","If I don't do my best, what's the point of doing it?","15 days","Vulnerable. My work is an extension of my soul.","Perfectionism"
"There are too many tabs open in my brain.","Overwhelmed. I can't even tell if it's 80% or 20%.","I want to be organized, but I just can't find the 'start' button.","1 week","Confused. I don't even know what I don't know.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelm"
"I can't let my parents see me fail this.","Like I've broken a promise to everyone who believes in me.","I want to make my family proud of my achievements.","3 weeks","Anxious about being lectured for being behind.","Validation/External Pressure"

"I'm afraid I'm just not cut out for this field.","Like a failure. I'm in the wrong major.","I'm trying to find out if I belong here.","2 weeks","Insecure. I feel like they'll see I'm not smart enough.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I’d rather take an extension than turn in something that’s not perfect.","Sick. I feel like I'm turning in a lie.","My identity is 'the one who does great work'.","1 month","Resistant. I don't want them to see my unfinished thoughts.","Perfectionism"
"I have the syllabus but I keep forgetting to check it.","Confused. I feel like I'm missing something important.","I want to do well, but I'm lost in the details.","12 days","Incompetent. I feel like a burden for needing basic help.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelmed"
"I want to be the best in the class to prove my worth.","Panicked. If I'm not the best, I'm nothing.","I need to be at the top to feel secure.","1 month","Competitive. I'm only asking for help to get an edge.","Validation/External Pressure"

"I’ve spent the day 'researching' the history of the building's name.","Avoidant. I’m learning everything except the actual prompt.","I want to feel 'academic' without the actual labor.","9 days","Silly. I feel like a child caught wandering the halls.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelmed"
"I want the TA to think I'm 'resilient' so I don't ask for time.","Stoic. I'm trading my sanity for a 'reliable' reputation.","I need to be the 'rock' of the seminar.","1 month","Hesitant. Help feels like a public admission of weakness.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I’ve rewritten the same thesis statement 70 times today.","Looping. I am a car stuck in a snowbank, tires spinning.","I want the foundation to be absolutely unassailable.","20 days","Paralyzed. I feel like a failure for being stuck.","Perfectionism"
"I'm citing authors I've only seen in the 'suggested reading'.","Superficial. I am building a bibliography of aspirations.","To sound like a scholar who has read 'the whole field'.","12 days","Guilty. I’m afraid they’ll ask for a specific chapter.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I haven't opened my bag since Monday; it feels like a heavy secret.","Weighted. Physical objects feel like moral indictments.","To maintain the image of the 'active student'.","4 days","Small. I’m asking for 're-entry' instructions.","Burnout"
"I’m using a 'classic' serif font to feel like a 'Real Writer'.","Performative. I’m playing a role I saw in a prestige drama.","I want to romanticize the struggle to make it bearable.","5 days","Self-conscious. I’m showing off the 'aesthetic'.","Validation/External Pressure"
"If I don’t get the 'highest' mark, the 'A' is just a participation prize.","Competitive. I only feel successful if I’m winning the curve.","To be the objective 'best' in the department.","1 month","Arrogant. I’m looking for the 'edge' on the others.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I’m starting the work now because the panic is louder than the sleep.","Desperate. I’m running from the 'zero' on the dashboard.","I’m trying to stay in the program at any cost.","1 day","Frantic. I need an answer five minutes ago.","Burnout"
"I am a collection of academic buzzwords held together by spite.","Brittle. I’m one critique away from a total meltdown.","To outshine the person who said I wouldn't make it.","1 month","Defensive. I treat every question like an attack.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I’m using 1.05 line spacing to make the paper look 'dense'.","Fraudulent. I’m a con artist with a library card.","I want to be seen as an intellectual heavyweight.","6 days","Guilty. I’m afraid they’ll notice the margin tricks.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I haven't had a proper meal in three days; just 'study snacks'.","Grimey. I am physically becoming part of the furniture.","To get through this so I can finally be a person again.","2 weeks","Drained. I’m asking for 'energy', not 'feedback'.","Burnout"
"If I don’t use 'post-structuralism', I’m just 'unfocused'.","Vague. I’m a jack-of-all-trades and master of none.","I want to be seen as 'broad' instead of 'shallow'.","16 days","Insecure. I’m afraid they’ll ask for a 'specialty'.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I’m citing a textbook I haven't opened because the syllabus did.","Hollow. I am a ventriloquist for someone else's expertise.","To look like I’ve mastered the foundational texts.","10 days","Fraudulent. I’m afraid they’ll ask for a page number.","Burnout"
"I haven't checked my grades because the notification is a threat.","Fragile. I am maintaining a state of 'quantum success'.","To keep the hope alive that I’m still doing well.","3 weeks","Petrified. Feedback feels like a final verdict on my soul.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I am a collection of high-yield YouTube tutorials.","Superficial. I am watching the movie instead of reading the book.","To gain the 'vibe' of knowledge without the effort.","5 days","Insecure. I feel like a tourist in my own major.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelmed"
"If I don’t use my 'focus' essential oils, the desk is a void.","Sensory-locked. I am waiting for a smell to start my brain.","To make the labor feel like a wellness ritual.","4 days","Silly. I’m focusing on the 'aura' instead of the 'argument'.","Perfectionism"
"I’m using 'systemic' to avoid explaining specific mechanics.","Vague. I am using broad strokes to hide small gaps.","To sound like a social critic instead of a confused student.","12 days","Translucent. I’m afraid they’ll ask for a case study.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I spent 7 hours 'migrating' my notes to a new app today.","Productive-wrong. I am re-skinning a project I haven't started.","To feel like a digital nomad instead of a procrastinator.","2 weeks","Immature. I’m showing off the 'workflow' as work.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelmed"
"I haven't taken my laptop out of the sleeve in three days.","Performative. The bag is just a heavy fashion accessory.","To signal to my roommates that I am 'on the grind'.","3 days","Small. I feel like I’m wearing a costume.","Burnout"
"If the first sentence isn't 'academic gold', I close the tab.","Stalled. I am waiting for a ghostwriter that isn't coming.","To protect my self-image as a 'high-level' thinker.","18 days","Paralyzed. I have no 'proof of life' for the paper.","Perfectionism"
"I am a collection of survival instincts and energy bar wrappers.","Gritty. I am physically becoming a part of the cubicle.","To finish so I can remember what a hobby feels like.","2 months","Drained. I don’t have the social battery for help.","Burnout"

"I am the first 'scholar' in my lineage; I cannot stumble.","Weighted. 80% feels like a betrayal of the family tree.","To validate the literal decades of work that got me here.","3 months","Obligated. Help feels like a failure of the 'legacy'.","Validation/External Pressure"
"If I ask for help, I’m admitting I’m just a 'hard worker'.","Insecure. I’m afraid I have no natural intuition left.","To prove that I belong in the 'honors' circle.","1 month","Humiliated. I’m waiting for them to spot the 'imposter'.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I’ve spent the morning 'cleaning' my desktop wallpaper choice.","Avoidant. I’m curating the scenery to avoid the task.","I want to feel 'inspired' before I feel 'challenged'.","5 days","Guilty. I’m hiding my lack of progress behind a 'vibe'.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelmed"
"I haven't felt 'inspired' by a prompt since my first year.","Flat. I am a ghost in the machine of the university.","To get the degree that justifies the tuition debt.","4 years","Apathetic. I just want the 'C' to get the credits.","Burnout"
"If the bibliography isn't in perfect Chicago style, it’s trash.","Rigid. I’m focusing on the plumbing because the house is empty.","I want to be beyond any possible technical critique.","14 days","Obsessive. I only want to talk about the 'format'.","Perfectionism"
"I want the professor to think I’m 'the one who asks deep questions'.","Performative. I’m using jargon to signal membership.","I need to be 'the intellectual' to feel secure.","1 month","Tentative. I’m asking for 'philosophical' advice.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I’m starting the work now because the library is finally quiet.","Nocturnal. I am 90% panic and 10% pure adrenaline.","To outrun the judgment of the sunrise.","1 day","Hysterical. I’m asking for a miracle, not a tutor.","Burnout"
"I’m afraid I’m only 'smart' because I know how to use Google.","Fraudulent. I am a search engine in a human suit.","I want to prove I can think without an internet connection.","3 weeks","Insecure. I don’t want them to see the 'search history'.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I’ve spent the day 'researching' the history of the building's name.","Avoidant. I’m learning everything except the actual prompt.","I want to feel 'academic' without the actual labor.","9 days","Silly. I feel like a child caught wandering the halls.","Executive Function Gaps/Overwhelmed"
"I want the TA to think I'm 'resilient' so I don't ask for time.","Stoic. I'm trading my sanity for a 'reliable' reputation.","I need to be the 'rock' of the seminar.","1 month","Hesitant. Help feels like a public admission of weakness.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I’ve rewritten the same thesis statement 70 times today.","Looping. I am a car stuck in a snowbank, tires spinning.","I want the foundation to be absolutely unassailable.","20 days","Paralyzed. I feel like a failure for being stuck.","Perfectionism"
"I'm citing authors I've only seen in the 'suggested reading'.","Superficial. I am building a bibliography of aspirations.","To sound like a scholar who has read 'the whole field'.","12 days","Guilty. I’m afraid they’ll ask for a specific chapter.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I haven't opened my bag since Monday; it feels like a heavy secret.","Weighted. Physical objects feel like moral indictments.","To maintain the image of the 'active student'.","4 days","Small. I’m asking for 're-entry' instructions.","Burnout"

"If I don’t get the 'highest' mark, the 'A' is just a participation prize.","Competitive. I only feel successful if I’m winning the curve.","To be the objective 'best' in the department.","1 month","Arrogant. I’m looking for the 'edge' on the others.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I’m starting the work now because the panic is louder than the sleep.","Desperate. I’m running from the 'zero' on the dashboard.","I’m trying to stay in the program at any cost.","1 day","Frantic. I need an answer five minutes ago.","Burnout"

"I’m using 1.05 line spacing to make the paper look 'dense'.","Fraudulent. I’m a con artist with a library card.","I want to be seen as an intellectual heavyweight.","6 days","Guilty. I’m afraid they’ll notice the margin tricks.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"

"I’m using 'nuanced' to avoid taking a definitive stance.","Non-committal. I am a shadow in my own argument.","To avoid being 'wrong' by never being 'certain'.","1 week","Vague. I’m afraid they’ll ask for a concrete conclusion.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I am a collection of high-protein bars and cold coffee.","Nutritionally-void. I am a body being kept alive for a degree.","To stay awake long enough to finish the things I ignored.","3 days","Jittery. I need a meal, not a meeting.","Burnout"

"I’m using 'paradigm' because I think it sounds like it costs $50,000.","Luxurious-vague. I am wearing a tuxedo to a backyard brawl.","To mask the fact that I don’t know what I’m talking about.","6 days","Hollow. I’m a high-fashion failure.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I haven't updated my laptop because the update screen takes too long.","Technological-stasis. I am working on a glitching machine.","To avoid the 15-minute window where I have to be alone with my thoughts.","2 months","Fragile. My computer is as tired as I am.","Burnout"
"I am a collection of 'How to Stop Procrastinating' bookmarks.","Recursive-irony. I am studying the lock while the house is on fire.","To feel like I’m 'solving' the problem while I’m ignoring the work.","1 month","Hollow. I have the theory of being a person, but not the practice.","Executive Function Gaps"

"I haven't slept in my bed; I just 'rested my eyes' on the sofa.","Uncomfortable. I am a martyr for a mediocre grade.","To prove I am 'sacrificing' for the work.","2 days","Drained. I’m a ghost in a hoodie.","Burnout"
"I am a collection of 'Study With Me' videos on 1.5x speed.","Efficiency-maniac. I am rushing toward an invisible line.","To feel productivity without the actual pace.","4 days","Jittery. I’m watching someone else work.","Burnout"
"I’m using 'moreover' to link two things that don't fit together.","Glue-logic. I am forcing a connection that isn't there.","To make a list of facts look like an argument.","3 days","Phony. I’m a carpenter with no nails.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I haven't spoken to my best friend because they are graduated.","Social-debt. I am spending my friendship on my guilt.","To preserve the image of being 'busy'.","1 week","Lonely. I’m a hermit of my own making.","Executive Function Gaps"
"I am the person who 'prepares' to study by washing the windows.","Domestic-diversion. I am a janitor, not a scholar.","To feel 'productive' with instant results.","6 hours","Exhausted. The floor is clean, the file is empty.","Executive Function Gaps"
"I haven't taken a 'real' shower in three days; just 'shaving'.","Gritty. I am physically bonding with the stress.","To save 'time' that I then waste on my phone.","3 days","Drained. I smell like dry shampoo and dread.","Burnout"
"I am a collection of 'Productivity' blogs I never actually read.","Hypocritical. I am a collector of maps I won't use.","To feel like I’m 'gathering tools' for a job.","1 month","Hollow. I know the 'how', but lack the 'will'.","Executive Function Gaps"
"I’m starting paragraphs with 'Interestingly,' to mask my anxiety.","Artificial-spark. I am trying to light a wet match.","To trick the reader into thinking I find this fascinating.","4 days","Bored. I’m a performer who hates the play.","Burnout"
"I haven't checked the syllabus for the 'Late Submission' rule.","Willful-blindness. If I don't know the limit, I didn't cross it.","To stay in a state of 'theoretical' safety.","3 weeks","Petrified. I’m afraid the door is already locked.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I am the person who highlights the 'References' and stops.","Reverse-logic. I am looking for the ending without the story.","To find the 'point' without the 'thinking'.","2 hours","Superficial. I’m a tourist in the text.","Burnout"
"I’m using 'intrinsic' to sound like I’ve done deep psychology.","Surface-depth. I am using a heavy word for a light thought.","To make a basic observation feel like a discovery.","1 week","Insecure. I’m dressing up a simple idea.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I haven't left the library because I’m 'scared of the car'.","Superstitious. I am looking for magic in architecture.","To avoid the responsibility of just starting.","8 hours","Silly. I’m waiting for lightning in a quiet room.","Perfectionism"
"I am a collection of 'Aesthetic' study playlists on Spotify.","Aesthetic-hope. I am looking for a feeling in a photo.","To replace the effort of doing with dreaming.","2 months","Hollow. My life is a collage of others' wins.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I’m using 'problematic' because I don't have a better critique.","Buzzword-crutch. I am pointing at a cloud, calling it a storm.","To sound 'aware' without being 'informed'.","5 days","Translucent. I’m afraid they’ll ask a specific question.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I haven't called my parents; they'll ask 'how it's going'.","Guilt-silence. I am a closed book with a missing title.","To avoid the shame of spinning my wheels.","2 weeks","Heavy. I’m a disappointment in the making.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I am the person who 'edits' page 1 to avoid page 10.","Stalled-perfection. I am polishing a stone, not building a wall.","To feel like I’m 'improving' while being 'stuck'.","3 days","Paralyzed. I have a perfect start and no end.","Perfectionism"
"I’m using 'essentially' to end a sentence I can't finish.","Frayed. I am tying a knot in a broken rope.","To finish the paragraph before my brain shuts down.","1 day","Exhausted. I’m out of words and time.","Burnout"
"I haven't opened my bag since Monday; it’s a block of guilt.","Weighted. Physical objects feel like moral indictments.","To maintain the image of the 'active student'.","4 days","Small. I’m asking for 're-entry' instructions.","Burnout"
"I am a collection of survival instincts and empty energy bar boxes.","Industrial. I am a machine on low-grade fuel.","To outrun the deadline and self-loathing.","1 day","Hysterical. I’m asking for a miracle.","Burnout"
"I’m choosing a font that looks 'academic' but is wider.","Typographic-fraud. I am stretching a thought to fill a page.","To reach word count without adding value.","3 hours","Guilty. I’m a tailor, not a writer.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I haven't opened my 'Finals' folder since the start of the year.","Vantablack. The folder is a void that swallows hope.","To live in a timeline where I haven't failed yet.","3 months","Petrified. I feel like I’m reporting a cold case.","Executive Function Gaps"
"I am a collection of 15 tabs all titled 'How to Write...'.","Citation-limbo. I am stuck on the mechanics of the ending.","To feel like I’m 'finishing' before I have started.","2 days","Small. I’m asking for a map of my own house.","Burnout"
"I’m using 'juxtaposition' to bridge two ideas that don't belong.","Glossy. I am using a fancy word to bridge a logical gap.","To sound like a critic while I’m actually just guessing.","5 days","Translucent. I’m afraid they’ll ask for a comparison.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I haven't checked the portal because of the 'Red' numbers.","Notification-numb. The alerts are a tally of my failures.","To maintain a world where I am still 'on track'.","12 days","Small. I feel like I’m hiding from my own life.","Executive Function Gaps"
"I am the person who brings five notebooks to a café and writes none.","Performative. I am carrying the burden of 'potential'.","To be seen as an intellectual by strangers I’ll never meet.","4 hours","Fraudulent. I’m showing off the cover, not the content.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I’m using 12.1pt font to sneak a third of a page onto the draft.","Micro-deception. I am a master of the optical illusion.","To meet the length requirement without the mental effort.","2 days","Guilty. I’m afraid they'll measure the characters.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I haven't seen the sun in two days; the library basement has no windows.","Vampiric. I am a ghost fueled by fluorescent lights.","To finish this so I can earn the right to exist outside again.","48 hours","Drained. I need a nap, not a grade.","Burnout"
"I’m using 'salient' because 'important' sounds like I’m in high school.","Inflated. I am a balloon of academic jargon.","To mask simplicity with complex vocabulary.","5 days","Hollow. I’m dressing a toddler in a tuxedo.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I haven't opened my email because I’m afraid of the 'Late' flags.","Vigilant. The inbox is a predator and I am the prey.","To maintain the safety of ignorance.","1 week","Small. I’m waiting for the list to forget me.","Executive Function Gaps"
"I’m starting the draft in bold font to 'make it look done'.","Desperate-vivid. I am looking for a pulse in the document.","To trick my brain into noticing the words again.","6 hours","Hysterical. I’m a neon-colored failure.","Burnout"

"I haven't taken a 'real' shower; just a 'sink wash' to save time.","Textile-surrender. I am merging with my own grime.","To reclaim five minutes for a draft I’m still not writing.","2 days","Grimey. I am a human-shaped pile of stress.","Burnout"
"I am the person who 'edits' by changing the font every 10 minutes.","Typographic-stall. I am rearranging deck chairs on the Titanic.","To feel like the essay is 'changing' without actually writing it.","3 hours","Paralyzed. I am a stylist of the void.","Perfectionism"
"I’m using 'intrinsic' to sound like I’ve done a psychological deep-dive.","Surface-depth. I am using a heavy word for a light thought.","To make a basic observation feel like a discovery.","1 week","Insecure. I’m dressing up a simple idea.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I haven't left my chair in six hours; I am a physical manifestation of guilt.","Rigid. I am a statue in a zip-up hoodie.","To prove I am 'sacrificing' for a grade I won't get.","6 hours","Stiff. I need a stretch, not a grade.","Burnout"
"I am a collection of 'Aesthetic' study playlists with zero play time.","Facade. I am building a stage for a silent play.","To replace the pain of study with the pleasure of a 'vibe'.","2 months","Superficial. I’m decorating a sinking ship.","Validation/External Pressure"
"I’m using 'subjective' to end a sentence I can't finish logically.","Evasive. I am calling my confusion a 'perspective'.","To protect myself from being 'wrong' by never being 'clear'.","5 days","Translucent. I’m not even in the document.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I haven't opened my bag since Friday; it’s a moral weight on the floor.","Heavy. The backpack contains the truth I’m avoiding.","To maintain the weekend fiction for as long as possible.","3 days","Small. I’m a child hiding from a backpack.","Executive Function Gaps"
"I am the person who 'edits' the title for two hours to feel productive.","Nominal-stall. I am naming a baby that hasn't been born yet.","To feel like I’ve captured the 'essence' without the effort.","3 hours","Silly. I’m a poet of the headline.","Burnout"
"I’m using 12.1pt font to sneak a line onto the next page.","Micro-deception. I am a master of the optical illusion.","To meet the length requirement without the mental effort.","2 days","Guilty. I’m afraid they’ll measure the characters.","Self Doubt/Anxiety"
"I haven't seen the sun in two days; the library has no windows.","Vampiric. I am a ghost fueled by fluorescent lights.","To finish this so I can earn the right to exist outside again.","48 hours","Drained. I need a nap, not a grade.","Burnout"
"I’m using 'salient' because 'important' sounds like I’m in high school.","Inflated. I am a balloon of academic jargon.","To mask simplicity with complex vocabulary.","5 days","Hollow. I’m dressing a toddler in a tuxedo.","Validation/External Pressure"
